---
pagetitle: "Eveniment — chen.ist"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=/academy/events/pages/ai-ethics-hackathon.html">
        <meta name="robots" content="noindex">
---

Redirecting to [event page](/academy/events/pages/ai-ethics-hackathon.html)...
